pages.title: National Portal for PM-KUSUM
pages.text: National Portal for PM-KUSUM National Portal PRADHAN MANTRI KISAN URJA SURAKSHA EVAM UTTHAAN MAHABHIYAN (PM-KUSUM) Slide 1 of 11 Slide 2 of 11 Slide 3 of 11 Slide 4 of 11 Slide 5 of 11 Slide 6 of 11 Slide 7 of 11 Slide 8 of 11 Slide 9 of 11 Slide 10 of 11 Slide 11 of 11 Previous Next प्रधानमंत्री-कुसुम योजना के नाम पर धोखाधड़ी करने वाली वैबसाइटों से सावधान, इनमें से कुछ फर्जी वेबसाइट डोमेन नाम * .org, * .in, * .com में पंजीकृत हैं जैसे www.kusumyojanaonline.in.net, www.pmkisankusumyojana.co.in, www.onlinekusamyojana.org.in, www.pmkisankusumyojana.com और इसी तरह की कई अन्य वेबसाइटें हैं।योजना की अधिक जानकारी के लिए नवीन और नवीकरणीय ऊर्जा मंत्रालय (MNRE) की आधिकारिक वेबसाइट www.mnre.gov.in पर विजिट करें अथवा टोल फ्री नंबर 1800-180-3333 डायल करें ! Pralhad Venkatesh Joshi (Hon'ble Cabinet Minister) Shripad Yesso Naik (Hon'ble Minister of State) About PM-KUSUM Pradhan Mantri Kisan Urja Suraksha evam Utthan Mahabhiyan (PM-KUSUM) Scheme for de-dieselisation of farm sector and enhancing the income of farmers. Under the Scheme, central government subsidy upto 30% or 50% of the total cost is given for the installation of standalone solar pumps and also for the solarization of existing grid-connected agricultural pumps. Further, farmers can also install grid-connected solar power plants up to 2MW under the Scheme on their barren/fallow land and sell electricity to local DISCOM at a tariff determined by state regulator. This scheme is being implemented by the designated departments of the State Government. READ MORE Grid Connected Solar Power Plants Component A Off Grid Solar Pumps Component B Grid Connected Solar Pumps Component C (IPS) Solarization Of Feeders Component C (FLS) Achievement Dashboard Achievements as of 31.05.2026 Component A 5,337.00 Sanctioned MW 767.34 Installed MW Sanctioned Installed Component B 5,61,438 Sanctioned Nos. 4,82,733 Installed Nos. Sanctioned Installed Component C (IPS) 18,387 Sanctioned 5,113 Solarised Sanctioned Solarised Component C (FLS) 11,73,975 Sanctioned 5,27,611 Solarised Sanctioned Solarised What's New OM dated 30.05.2025 regarding the Compliance of QCO,2017 in PM-KUSUM Scheme Domestic Content Requirement (DCR) norms for Solar PV Cells- Reg. Public Information State Wise vendor list and Rate card Service Center Report Test Report of Solar Pumping System / Module Mounting Structure (MMS) Scheme Beneficiary List Documents Show More 20260429-Revision of CFA formats under Comp C FLS 20260426-OM-Revised_format for PBI Claim under Comp A Clarification to SIA regarding extension dated 25.05.2026 Extension of timeline for financial closure and completion of projects under PM KUSUM scheme - reg Compliance of specification of the Module Mounting Structure (MMS) through SIAS and Vendors under PM KUSUM scheme - reg Advisory -Adherenence to Scheme guidelines including relating to Escrow arrangement agreements and letter of credit (LC) provision for projects under Component-A and C(FLS).pdf Clarification with regard to the issuance of the Notice to Proceed (NTP) and imposition of the Liquidity Damage (LD) OM regarding Clarification in the change in GST on installation of solar pumps sanctioned under Component-B of PM-KUSUM Scheme Component-B OM dated 04.09.2025 regarding the issuance of WO Social Media Video Gallery Slide 1 of 3 ▶ Slide 2 of 3 ▶ Slide 3 of 3 ▶ Previous Next Events & Meetings Chintan Shivir Regional Workshop Mumbai Regional Workshop Jaipur Developed by HKRP Innovations Limited Original text Rate this translation Your feedback will be used to help improve Google Translate cancel प्रधानमंत्री-कुसुम योजना के नाम पर धोखाधड़ी करने वाली वैबसाइटों से सावधान मंत्रालय के संज्ञान में आया है कि कई फर्जी वेबसाइट और मोबाइल एप्लिकेशन आवेदकों से प्रधानमंत्री किसान ऊर्जा सुरक्षा एवं उत्थान महाभियान (प्रधानमंत्री-कुसुम योजना) के नाम पर किसानों से सोलर पम्प लगाने हेतु ऑनलाइन आवेदन पत्र भरने के साथ पंजीकरण शुल्क तथा पंप की कीमत का ऑनलाइन भुगतान करने को कह रहे हैं। इनमें से कुछ फर्जी वेबसाइट डोमेन नाम * .org, * .in, * .com में पंजीकृत हैं जैसे www.kusumyojanaonline.in.net, www.pmkisankusumyojana.co.in, www.onlinekusamyojana.org.in, www.pmkisankusumyojana.com और इसी तरह की कई अन्य वेबसाइटें हैं। इसलिए प्रधानमंत्री-कुसुम योजना के लिए आवेदन करने वाले सभी किसानों को सलाह दी जाती है कि वे धोखाधड़ी करने वाली वेबसाइटों पर न जाएं तथा कोई भी भुगतान न करें। प्रधानमंत्री-कुसुम योजना को राज्य सरकार के विभागों द्वारा कार्यान्वित किया जा रहा है। योजना की अधिक जानकारी के लिए नवीन और नवीकरणीय ऊर्जा मंत्रालय (MNRE) की आधिकारिक वेबसाइट www.mnre.gov.in पर विजिट करें अथवा टोल फ्री नंबर 1800-180-3333 डायल करें ! सतर्क रहें धोखाधड़ी से बचें
discovered_documents: https://pmkusum.mnre.gov.in/assets/pdf/What's-new/OM dated 30.05.2025 regarding the Compliance of QCO,2017 in PM-KUSUM Scheme.PDF
https://pmkusum.mnre.gov.in/assets/pdf/What's-new/Domestic Content Requirement (DCR) norms for Solar PV Cells- Reg.PDF

reg Compliance of specification of the Module Mounting Structure (MMS) through SIAS and Vendors under PM KUSUM scheme - reg Advisory -Adherenence to Scheme guidelines including relating to Escrow arrangement agreements and letter of credit (LC) provision for projects under Component-A and C(FLS).pdf Clarification with regard to the issuance of the Notice to Proceed (NTP) and imposition of the Liquidity Damage (LD) OM regarding Clarification in the change in GST on installation of solar pumps sanctioned under Component-B of PM-KUSUM Scheme Component-B OM dated 04.09.2025 regarding the issuance of WO Social Media Video Gallery Slide 1 of 3 ▶ Slide 2 of 3 ▶ Slide 3 of 3 ▶ Previous Next Events & Meetings Chintan Shivir Regional Workshop Mumbai Regional Workshop Jaipur Developed by HKRP Innovations Limited Original text Rate this translation Your feedback will be used to help improve Google Translate cancel प्रधानमंत्री-कुसुम योजना के नाम पर धोखाधड़ी करने वाली वैबसाइटों से सावधान मंत्रालय के संज्ञान में आया है कि कई फर्जी वेबसाइट और मोबाइल एप्लिकेशन आवेदकों से प्रधानमंत्री किसान ऊर्जा सुरक्षा एवं उत्थान महाभियान (प्रधानमंत्री-कुसुम योजना) के नाम पर किसानों से सोलर पम्प लगाने हेतु ऑनलाइन आवेदन पत्र भरने के साथ पंजीकरण शुल्क तथा पंप की कीमत का ऑनलाइन भुगतान करने को कह रहे हैं। इनमें से कुछ फर्जी वेबसाइट डोमेन नाम * .org, * .in, * .com में पंजीकृत हैं जैसे www.kusumyojanaonline.in.net, www.pmkisankusumyojana.co.in, www.onlinekusamyojana.org.in, www.pmkisankusumyojana.com और इसी तरह की कई अन्य वेबसाइटें हैं। इसलिए प्रधानमंत्री-कुसुम योजना के लिए आवेदन करने वाले सभी किसानों को सलाह दी जाती है कि वे धोखाधड़ी करने वाली वेबसाइटों पर न जाएं तथा कोई भी भुगतान न करें। प्रधानमंत्री-कुसुम योजना को राज्य सरकार के विभागों द्वारा कार्यान्वित किया जा रहा है। योजना की अधिक जानकारी के लिए नवीन और नवीकरणीय ऊर्जा मंत्रालय (MNRE) की आधिकारिक वेबसाइट www.mnre.gov.in पर विजिट करें अथवा टोल फ्री नंबर 1800-180-3333 डायल करें ! सतर्क रहें धोखाधड़ी से बचें

analysis.overview: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Urja Suraksha evam Utthan Mahabhiyan (PM-KUSUM) is a Government of India scheme aimed at de-dieselising the farm sector and enhancing farmers' income by promoting solar energy. It provides central government subsidy for installation of standalone solar pumps, solarization of grid-connected agricultural pumps, and installation of grid-connected solar power plants up to 2MW on barren/fallow land. Farmers can sell electricity generated to local DISCOM at tariffs determined by state regulators. The scheme is implemented by designated departments of State Governments.
objectives: Promoting installation of standalone solar pumps
Promoting solarization of existing grid-connected agricultural pumps
Enabling installation of grid-connected solar power plants up to 2MW on barren/fallow land
Facilitating sale of solar power to local DISCOM at state-determined tariffs
analysis.eligibility: Farmers seeking to install standalone solar pumps, solarize existing grid-connected agricultural pumps, or install grid-connected solar power plants up to 2MW on their barren/fallow land are eligible under the scheme, as implemented by designated departments of State Governments.
analysis.benefits: Central government subsidy up to 30% or 50% of total cost for installation of standalone solar pumps and solarization of grid-connected agricultural pumps; opportunity to install grid-connected solar power plants up to 2MW on barren/fallow land and sell electricity to local DISCOM at tariff determined by state regulator; enhanced income for farmers; reduction in diesel dependence in agriculture.
analysis.financial_support: Under the Scheme, central government subsidy upto 30% or 50% of the total cost is given for the installation of standalone solar pumps and also for the solarization of existing grid-connected agricultural pumps. Further, farmers can also install grid-connected solar power plants up to 2MW under the Scheme on their barren/fallow land and sell electricity to local DISCOM at a tariff determined by state regulator.
analysis.application_process: 1. Visit the official PM-KUSUM portal or MNRE website for information. 2. Beware of fraudulent websites and mobile applications impersonating PM-KUSUM. 3. Apply through designated departments of the State Government. 4. Submit required documents as per state-level guidelines. 5. Await approval and installation of solar pumps or power plants. 6. For grid-connected systems, sell electricity to local DISCOM at state-determined tariff.
analysis.implementing_agency: Designated departments of the State Government
caveats: Beware of fraudulent websites and mobile applications impersonating PM-KUSUM, some registered with domain names *.org, *.in, *.com such as www.kusumyojanaonline.in.net, www.pmkisankusumyojana.co.in, www.onlinekusamyojana.org.in, www.pmkisankusumyojana.com
Do not make any payments to fraudulent websites
Scheme is implemented by State Government departments; applicants must approach designated state-level authorities
